name: Chuck's Barley-Mushroom Winter Borscht (Vegan
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Mixed baby lima beans, split
5 to 6 Turnips, peeled and cubed (or 2 Parsnips, or 2 Potatoes)
3 tbsp Unsalted butter (or margarine for vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add garlic and onion. Cook until onions are translucent.
2. Add barley, lima beans, peas, lentils, miso, and water to the pot with garlic and onion. Stir well.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer for about 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Add turnips and carrots to the pot. Continue simmering until cooked through.
5. If using broccoli stems, add them at this point. Also, if available, stir in shredded/sliced cabbage about halfway through cooking.
6. Add mushrooms, spices (garlic, pepper, marjoram, rosemary), and tamari. Return to a low simmer and cook for another hour.
7. Stir in butter or margarine. Allow the soup to sit for a few minutes before serving.
8. If preparing the soup ahead of time, add 1 cup of water just before serving to prevent the barley from absorbing too much liquid and becoming a gruel.
The butter can be omitted for a lighter soup.
